# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment that pulls our application image from Docker Hub. Use the latest tag so we always get the newest version automatically. This is for our development environment where we want continuous updates without manual intervention.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: app-deployment
  namespace: development
  labels:
    app: my-application
    environment: development
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-application
      environment: development
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-application
        environment: development
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: my-application
          # NOTE: Using a mutable tag like "latest" is acceptable ONLY in development.
          # For staging/production, always pin to an immutable digest, e.g.:
          # image: myorg/my-application@sha256:<digest>
          image: myorg/my-application:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: dockerhub-credentials
